description_long: This is a robust, cylindrical wooden barrel reinforced with thick, black metal bands running vertically and horizontally around its body. The wood staves are dark brown, showing a natural grain and some weathering, suggesting durability and age. The top of the barrel is sealed with a matching wooden lid, also secured by metal, and features a central star-shaped metal plate for added strength. The metal bands are riveted at key points, providing structural integrity and a classic, industrial look. There are no visible handles, but the reinforced design implies it is built to withstand heavy use and rough handling. The overall appearance is utilitarian, making it suitable for storage or transport of goods in urban or industrial settings.
description: A sturdy wooden barrel with black metal bands and a sealed wooden lid, featuring a star-shaped metal plate on top. The design is classic and industrial, with visible wood grain and reinforced metalwork.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central metal band and star-shaped plate on the lid, with wood grain and rivets clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, highlighting the curvature of the barrel and the continuous metal reinforcement.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, emphasizing the seamless connection of the metal bands and the uniformity of the wood staves.
description_view_3: Back view, similar to the others, with the metal bands and lid details consistently visible.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black metal bands, vertical and horizontal, riveted
